Beijing plate limits

On Friday the restricted tail numbers are 5 and 0 for the current rotation period.

Out-of-town vehicles follow the same weekday tail-number rules inside the Fifth Ring Road.

The rotation schedule alternates pairs of ending digits so that roughly one-fifth of local plates are restricted on any given weekday, spreading congestion across the work week.

Drivers can check the official calendar online; enforcement cameras on major arterials record violations that carry a standard fine and a points deduction on the license.

Electric and hydrogen fuel-cell vehicles are generally exempt, while hybrid policies vary by district; always confirm the latest bulletin before planning a cross-city trip.

Holiday weeks sometimes suspend restrictions to ease tourism traffic, but weekday rules resume immediately after the public holiday ends unless a separate notice is published.
